name: DCPU Sivagangai – Protection Officer, Outreach Worker – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Protection Officer, Outreach Worker Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai (DCPU Sivagangai) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Protection Officer, Outreach Worker. Candidates with Master's degree, 12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DCPU Sivagangai official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management, Any degree with 2 years experience in women and child development / social welfare works, 12th Pass

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sivagangai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai Protection Officer (Non-Institutional)
